sections.title: Without the requirements for Desert Treasure I

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Howdy stranger. What brings you out to these parts?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing much - What are you doing here? It doesn't seem like there's much to do out here in the desert!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, that's where you'd be wrong. I work for the Archaeological Society of Varrock, and have been excavating around here recently.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Was there something you specifically wanted?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you have any quests? Call it a hunch, but you look like the type of man who might...

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, it's funny you should say that. I'm not sure if I would really call it a quest as such, but I found this ancient stone tablet in one of my excavations, and it would really help me out if you

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: could go and take it back to the digsite for me and get it examined.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: It's very old, and I don't recognise any of the inscriptions on it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, I was heading that way anyway. Any particular person at the digsite you want me to talk to?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: His name's Terry Balando. Give it to nobody but him. I'm sorry, I can't entrust you with the actual tablet I found, it is far too valuable to give away, but I took these etchings - they should be enough for him to make

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: a preliminary translation on. Come back and let me know what he says, I would hate to waste my time excavating anything that isn't worth my time as a world famous archaeologist!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks. Playing delivery boy doesn't really sound much like fun to me.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, okay. Can't say as I blame you for thinking that. I'll go take it there myself later I guess.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you, anyway?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: You don't recognise me??? I am the world famous Asgarnia Smith, Archaeologist extraordinaire!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: I am the one who discovered the long forgotten Temple of Ikov! The one who unearthed the strange trap filled arena in Brimhaven!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: I'm the leading archaeological expert of our time! I was voted archaeologist of the year four years running by the Varrock Herald! Are you REALLY sure you've never heard of me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I really haven't.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well then, I'm confused. Why did you come over and speak to me if you don't know who I am? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing really. I'm just wandering around for no good reason.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Uh-huh. Well, if you'll excuse me, I have a lot more work to do before I can bed down for the night.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Hello again. You find any signs of that treasure yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... not as such, but I unleashed a powerful demon from its tomb in return for unbelievable magical power.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: So... no gold then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not as such, no. Sorry about that.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Aw... I was hoping to go abroad on holiday this year.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Maybe I'll go check out Karamja next, I hear there's treasure to be found there...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As you are a big famous archaeologist, maybe you could spare the time to tell me a couple of tales of your exploits?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Hey, sure thing kid! Well, this one time I found this spooky old temple in the middle of the jungle.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: The entrance was hidden from sight by all these vines and stuff, and it was full of zombies and crazy tribesmen and stuff.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: That wasn't the worst thing though! There were all these crazy traps that were hidden around the place too!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well anyway, I found the secret entrance, fought my way in through the zombies and tribesmen, and came to a big pedestal with a statue of solid gold sat on top of it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Solid gold, huh? Wow.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: That's right! It was a cunning trap though! As soon as I picked up the statue, a trapdoor opened up underneath me, and I fell into a darkened room, full of

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: bones, and the biggest meanest tribesman you ever did see!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Huge he was, and real ugly looking! He had this huge sword too, and he came running towards me screaming something in some language I didn't understand!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What did you do?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, while he was screaming at me, and swinging his sword around in front of me, trying to intimidate me before attacking, I cooly and calmly...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: All the while, knowing that if I died in this spot nobody would even know where I was...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What then?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: I knew, if this tribesman killed me, that would be the end of Asgarnia Smith, and all of his treasure hunting...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: SO WHAT DID YOU DO?!?!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, while he was screaming and waving his sword around, I stood behind a nearby stalactite, then shot him with my shortbow.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: And that was how I recovered the Golden Monkey of Tee-Ta-Toh.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... How exactly did you get into this line of work anyway?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It seems an odd choice of career for a man like yourself.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Thinking of joining your pal Asgarnia in the wonderful world of treasure hun- um, archaeology, huh?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, it all started the day I was fishing in catherby, funnily enough.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Ah yes, I remember it well... I was just sat there, hoping to catch a bass or two, when I made the most amazing discovery!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: In my fishing nets, I had found an ancient casket, marred and worn by centuries underwater!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: With trembling hands, I slowly and cautiously opened it, wondering what ancient secret may have been kept inside...

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: What valuable heirloom may have been dredged up by my nets that had not decayed underwater long ago...

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: And you know what I found inside?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, what?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: I found 320 coins! Just like that! Just by fishing I had found 320 coins! 320 coins! Can you believe it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Um... Yes, yes I can.

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Well, it might not seem much to us now kid, but back then, it was a revelation!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Why waste my time fishing when there were secret treasures from long ago hidden around the world?

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: I immediately applied to the Museum of Varrock as a field agent, and the rest is history!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nice hat!

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Hey, thanks kid. Looking snazzy is an important part of being a treasure hunter!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I'll see you again sometime maybe. Sorry I couldn't get you any treasure...

lines.speaker: Asgarnia Smith
lines.text: Ah, don't sweat it kid. I'll be honest with ya - I'm already rich many times over, and its more the kicks of being a treasure hunter I do it for than the actual cash!
